story_context: attention-driven public story optimized for anger shareability and identity conflict

review.governance_note: High-priority storytelling governance review required. Storytelling value is limited. Strengthen clarity, evidence grounding, memory continuity, audience reasoning, dignity, and public usefulness. Narrative responsibility is limited. Strengthen truthfulness, context, consent, uncertainty disclosure, revision openness, and accountability. Misuse risk is elevated. Review oversimplification, emotional exploitation, scapegoating, context loss, platform frictionlessness, and human review. AI storytelling governance is limited. Improve provenance, source traceability, human review, consent discipline, use limits, and correction process. Escalate. Misuse risk is high and public reasoning is weak.
